3194230.name: The Upper Downer Complex Demo
3194230.description: The Upper Downer Complex is a Game set in a Dream. In this demo, you are exploring 1/12 of the Game and getting your first foot into the Concept of Exploration and Quiet storytelling. In this demo, you will not be Hand holded. Explore at your own Risk. This game and this Demo is still in progress and will feature many Aspects of Dream Core and Liminal Spaces, but still with a unique Style and Setting. Shape the Future of The Upper Downer Complex with us in our Discord and Steam Community.
3194230.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
